## Crypto\_2.KeyStore.KeyStore.open() method

Opens an existing encrypted key store. Call `unlock(password)` to decrypt and access secrets.

**Signature:**

```typescript
static open(params: IKeyStoreOpenParams): Result<KeyStore>;
```
